name: Cauliflower Au Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cauliflower florets in a large pot.
2. Cover with water and bring to a boil. (Why not steam them?)
3. Drain the cauliflower well.
4. Melt butter or margarine in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly.
5. Gradually add flour and stir until thickened.
6. Add salt and pepper to taste.
7. Pour in cold milk and stir until smooth.
8. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish coated with vegetable cooking spray.
9. Sprinkle cheese on top.
10. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
